items.name_en: onthego Small Series | CODE: M45654
items.name_cn:
onthego Small Series | CODE: M45654
2023 Early Spring Series [Exclusive Quality]
🤎Dimensions: 25 x 19 x 11.5cm
The best choice for full leather this season in the ONTHEGO Small Series
OnTheGo Small Handbag, the Tote bag draws inspiration from the classic Sac Plat handbag from 1968, creating a miniature version in Monogram Empreinte leather with a pressed Medium Bicolor Monogram pattern, capable of holding an iPad Mini and other daily essentials. Flexible handles and a removable shoulder strap enrich carrying options.

SIDE TRUNK M46358#Inspection-free Version#
▪️Size: 21*14*6cm▪️
A viral hit in the C-position, this soft Side Trunk box 👜
Captures hearts with its high-end look, breaking away from traditional hard boxes with a bold soft-and-hard design. Detachable handles and shoulder straps make it truly amazing. With the high-visual appeal of a bestseller and high usage rate, it offers a large capacity. Stylish and lazy-chic, yet retains a cool temperament. A must-have with a premium look!

WALLET ON CHAIN LILY Series M82509 Uninspected Version#
❒ Size: 20.7*10.2*3.5cm ❒
I'm absolutely in love with the lily woc series!
In terms of looks, the design is stunning!
I have to say, the designer really understands what girls want. The simple body paired with unique and exquisite chains gives the bag a unique vibe!
It looks exquisite but has a very high capacity.
Suitable for all seasons, it can be used as a clutch, crossbody, shoulder bag, or underarm bag. Multiple carrying styles!
Full of atmosphere, a must-have!

CAMERA BOX Series M82465 Uninspected Version#
■ Size: 12.5*17.6*6cm ■
A must-have showpiece for autumn and winter. This camera box series is simply an instant hit!
The reversible color-block soft box design paired with a small handle makes the bag look exquisite, petite, yet elegant and sophisticated!
The four-corner hardware is heavy-duty quality, the authentic small hard suitcase standard!
Truly another "King of Hits"—not only does it have stunning looks, but it also satisfies daily capacity needs. More importantly, it offers versatile carrying styles!

items.name_en: SAUMUR BB Twin Star Series M46740 Uninspected Version #
items.name_cn:
SAUMUR BB Twin Star Series M46740 Uninspected Version #
❐ Size: 20*16*7.5cm ❐
The SAUMUR BB series has become a "must-have bag king". The classic monogram colorway is simple and retro. The aura of the Twin Star itself brings its own atmosphere, and the visual appeal is unexpectedly high-class!
Habitually free your hands; the strap is flexibly adjustable, and the capacity is impressive! One bag, multiple ways to carry, versatile for any season!
Trust me, this is a must-have; it has been a top-tier best-seller with consistent price premiums!

items.name_en: LOOP HOBO Runway Edition #M46311# Inspection-free Version
items.name_cn:
LOOP HOBO Runway Edition #M46311# Inspection-free Version
▪️Size: 38*26*10cm▪️
The runway Loop Hobo is simply full of fashion sense,
With a crescent moon shape, it was loved at first sight on the runway.
The bag shape is lazy yet stylish, sweet and salty,
Monogram color blocking, classic yet eye-catching. With two shoulder straps,
The metal chain can be used as a retro clutch, and the leather strap can be crossbody or shoulder, offering multiple ways to style.
Great capacity, with a mother-and-child bag design, making it both stylish and practical. The winner of both looks and functionality!

items.name_en: ONLINE ONLY Shaomai Bag #M82885# Uninspected Version
items.name_cn:
ONLINE ONLY Shaomai Bag #M82885# Uninspected Version
▪️Size: 11.5*11.5*11.5cm▪️
Mini Bucket Bag Shaomai Bag Series Zjs jh Online Only Shaomai Bag, presented in modern and refined Monogram Reverse canvas. A special project designed by designer Nicolas Ghesquière to commemorate the fashion show held in Korea. The compact design evokes the Korean traditional pocket 'Fukubukuro' symbolizing good fortune. Details like the LV circle and trunk-inspired metal corners reflect the house's unique sensibility. A luxury bag suitable for both daily styling and evening wear. As a limited edition, this product is currently available for online purchase only.

items.name_cn:
EXCURSION Backpack Series M46932# Uninspected Version#
❐ Size: 21*23*10cm ❐
This compact and practical EXCURSION small backpack is made of Monogram canvas with leather trim, exuding a hiking spirit. The main compartment features an adjustable slider closure, and there are two buckle pockets on the front. In addition to the top handle, it also comes with a chain, allowing for free switching of carrying styles.
